display.purpose: Used for hero stats and large numerical values. Italic Cormorant Garamond adds academic prestige.

components.name: Primary Button
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: oklch(68% 0.17 55); color: #fff; padding: 0.75rem 1.5rem; border-radius: 0.75rem; font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-weight: 700; border: none; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(68% 0.17 55 / 0.15); transition: all 0.4s cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(58% 0.17 55); transform: translateY(-1px); box-shadow: 0 8px 16px oklch(68% 0.17 55 / 0.2); }

components.name: Resource Card
components.description: Standard floating container for educational content.
components.html:
GENERAL TEST

Quantitative Aptitude

Master the fundamentals of numbers and logic.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border-radius: 1.25rem; padding: 1.5rem; box-shadow: 0px 12px 32px rgba(25, 28, 30, 0.06); transition: all 0.3s ease; border: 1px solid rgba(148, 163, 184, 0.15); } .ds-card:hover { transform: translateY(-4px); border-color: oklch(68% 0.17 55 / 0.2); } .ds-card-eyebrow { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 0.7rem; font-weight: 700; color: oklch(68% 0.17 55); letter-spacing: 0.14em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 0.5rem; } .ds-card-title { font-family: 'Manrope', sans-serif; font-size: 1.1rem; font-weight: 700; color: #191c1e; margin: 0 0 0.5rem; } .ds-card-body { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #434655; margin: 0; line-height: 1.5; }

narrative.overview: CUET Corner is designed to feel like a warm sunrise—a signal of hope and clarity for 16-17 year olds navigating the anxiety of university entrance exams. The aesthetic is 'Supportive Mentor': authoritative yet approachable, replacing the cold, utilitarian feel of traditional EdTech with a prestigious, editorial experience.
keyCharacteristics: Warmth over Drama: Amber-tinted neutrals and soft light over cold grays.
Clarity over Density: One primary idea per viewport; breathing room for the story.
Supportive Elevation: Surfaces that float slightly, suggesting a workspace that is organized and ready.

rules.name: The 10% Radiance Rule
rules.body: The primary Confidence Amber is used on ≤10% of any given screen. Its rarity makes it a powerful signal for 'what to do next.'

rules.name: The Soft Shadow Rule
rules.body: Shadows are never structural or heavy. Use 0px 12px 32px rgba(25, 28, 30, 0.06) for ambient depth.

dos: Do use clamp() for fluid, readable headlines across budget Android devices.
Do ensure touch targets are at least 48px for mobile accessibility.
Do lead with 'Mentor’s Guidance'—every screen must answer 'What's next?'.
donts: Don't use side-stripe borders as colored accents on cards.
Don't use gradient text; maintain solid color authority.
Don't use FOMO tactics like countdown timers or 'Batch Bazaar' clutter.
